summary: Poor‑quality recording with odd buzzing and funky tone, but Jerry’s Twilight Zone tease offers a quirky highlight.
review: Both reviewers note an unusual, buzzy sound that makes the set feel “funky” and oddly distorted—likely a problematic source. While the performance has a few bright spots (Jerry’s twilight‑zone tease and an expansive space jam), the overall listening experience is hampered by the strange tonal qualities.

ai_rating.rationale: Two low‑star reviews point to a problematic recording and limited musical positives, leading to an overall below‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Weird buzz and funky, odd sounding tones throughout; reviewers describe the audio as distorted and strange.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; only vague references to a “weird night” and an out‑there space jam.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Twilight Zone tease noted as amusing despite overall odd sound.
band_member_comments.Bob: New guitar tone described as weird and contributing to the strange buzz.
